sentences.sentence: Lockers are located past the front desk.
Free weights sit along the back wall.
The study room near the cardio area stays open late.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress placement in compound noun (study room)

sentences.sentence: Towels are restocked automatically every Wednesday afternoon.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables in multi-syllable words (automatically, Wednesday)

sentences.sentence: You can reserve a comfortable spot for our group classes.
sentences.structure: declarative with direct address and prepositional phrase
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced function words in rapid sequence (for our); comfortable

sentences.sentence: When the machines are busy, you may sign up for a turn at the desk.
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress-timing across a long sentence; reduced function words (for a)

sentences.sentence: If you are unsure where to begin, check the schedule posted by the main entrance for class times.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause + wayfinding pointer, comma-split
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress-timing over 15+ words; reduced function words in rapid sequence (for class)

sentences.sentence: Sign-in sheets are kept at the desk.
Drop-in help is included with your student account.
The quiet study room can be accessed through the side hall.
Writing sessions run through the afternoon on most weekdays.
You can book a tutor for math or science online.
sentences.structure: declarative with direct address and compound object
sentences.phonetic_focus: compound object linking; reduced function words (for a)

sentences.sentence: When you experience trouble with an essay, a tutor can review it with you.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (you_experience); stress-timing

sentences.sentence: If you cannot find your assigned room, check the directory posted near the front entrance for current locations.
sentences.structure: fronted conditional clause + wayfinding pointer, comma-split
sentences.phonetic_focus: stress-timing over 15+ words; reduced function words (for current)

sentences.sentence: First, tape your paper to the board.
Next, dampen the surface with a clean, wet brush.
Then mix small amounts of paint on the palette.
Apply the lightest colors across the sky first.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-cts? lightest, -lts); reduced syllables (comfortable rhythm)

sentences.sentence: Let each layer dry completely before adding the next.
Blend the edges gently with a damp, soft brush.
sentences.structure: imperative with manner and instrument phrases

sentences.sentence: Lastly, rinse your brushes in clean water and lay them flat to dry overnight.
sentences.phonetic_focus: final consonant clusters at phrase boundaries (brushes_in); stress-timing over the long step
